"true", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/tnunnink/Documents/Projects/logixdb/src/LogixDb.sln", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "preferences.sourceCode.SQL", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ], "com.intellij.ide.scratch.LRUPopupBuilder$1/SQL Dialect": [ "TSQL", "SQLite" ] } }

task.summary: Default task
Update README: expand SQL schema architecture section with detailed descriptions of deduplication models, natural keys, and performance considerations.
Update README: expand component relationship diagrams with additional links and metadata details.
Update `.idea` workspace: adjust change tracking details, refine task summaries, and update task counters.

Update README: restructure "Core Concepts" section for clarity, remove duplicate content, and enhance descriptions for deduplication and version mapping; update tests to switch `property_id` to `uniqueidentifier` type in migrations.
Increase delay in `SourceIngestionServiceTests` to improve test stability.
Refactor `release.yml`: improve consistency with indentation, add forced overwrites in PowerShell commands, and streamline steps.
Refactor `release.yml`: fix indentation in `Prepare Combined Release` step for consistency.
Update migration: remove unique constraint from `program_name` and `routine_name` composite index in `routine` table
Bump version to 0.11.1 in `LogixDb.Service` and `LogixDb.Cli` project files.
Remove unique constraint on `program_name` and `tag_name` composite index in `tag` table; bump version to 0.11.2 in `LogixDb.Service` and `LogixDb.Cli` project files.
Add `operand` to component types and adjust indexes in `operand` table migration
Add versioned helper functions for various database components, including tags, controllers, operands, data types, programs, tasks, routines, and AOIs.
Add version mapping for `operand` components in SQLite and SQL Server merge scripts; update user dictionary settings
Update workspace configuration to reflect changes in migration files and merge scripts
Add tests for verifying creation of versioned functions in SQL Server migrations and update `AssertFunctionExists` in test fixtures.
Remove `aoi_rung` table migration and update `routine` table with `container_name` and `is_definition` columns.
Remove redundant `aoi_rung` migration tests, add `module` table migration tests, and update `routine` and `operand` index definitions.

Remove `GetVersionedTagValues` and `GetVersionedAoiRungs` functions, refactor transformers to use `Query<Routine>` for consistent retrieval of routines and rungs, and update `RoutineMap` with `container_name` and `is_definition` columns.
Remove `AoiRungMap` and associated references from `AoiTransformer` to simplify AOI processing logic.
Remove `MergeAoiRung.sql` scripts and associated references to streamline migration and merge logic.
Update tests to add `rung_reference` and remove redundant `aoi_rung` assertions
Update `MergeRoutine.sql` scripts to replace `program_name` with `container_name` and add `is_definition` field in SQLite and SQL Server merge logic.
Update migration tags for helper functions and refactor test setup to simplify database migration calls
Bump version to 0.12.0 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Normalize EOF in `M20260527Tests.cs`.
Add `is_native` field to operands, update related SQL scripts and tests.
Fix `is_native` column type in `M20260308Tests` from `integer` to `bit`.
Bump version to 0.12.1 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add `is_native` field to operand seeding logic in `M202603082130SeedNativeOperands`
Bump version to 0.12.2 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add composite index on `version_id` and `component_id` in `target_version_map` table
Refactor component ID filtering to use `JOIN` with `target_component` for improved query clarity in migrations and tests.
Bump version to 0.12.3 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Fix table alias in `dbo.GetVersionedTagComments` migration for `tag_comment` table.
Add clustered indexes to various migration tables and update primary key definitions where applicable
Add database-specific table creation logic and index updates for `tag_member` and `data_type_member` tables.
Bump version to 0.12.4 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add database-specific logic for `rung` table creation and indexing in migration
Bump version to 0.12.5 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add fake tag and program generation logic to `TestSource.Fake` for improved test data creation
Update migrations to add unique indexes for `target_component` and `target_version_map` tables and enhance `TestSource` with public fake data generators and tests.
Mark `ExecuteQuery_AfterLargeNumberOfFakeImports_ShouldBePerformant` test as explicit for ongoing work on high-load query stress testing.
Bump version to 0.12.6 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Update `M20260206Tests` to assert `component_id` column type as `tinyint`
Update `.idea` workspace configuration to reflect changes in migrations, performance tests, and schema mappings.
Add SQLite and SQL Server-specific table creation and indexing logic for `rung`, `tag_member`, and `data_type_member` tables in migrations.
Rnemaed all the version helper functions to different name that aligns more with the database table names for easy discovery.
Bump version to 0.12.7 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Rename versioned helper functions for rung hierarchy to a unified `logic_for` function, simplify test assertions, and update workspace configuration to reflect changes.

MESSAGE.value: Normalize EOF in `M20260527Tests.cs`.
Add `is_native` field to operands, update related SQL scripts and tests.
Fix `is_native` column type in `M20260308Tests` from `integer` to `bit`.
Bump version to 0.12.1 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add `is_native` field to operand seeding logic in `M202603082130SeedNativeOperands`
Bump version to 0.12.2 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add composite index on `version_id` and `component_id` in `target_version_map` table
Refactor component ID filtering to use `JOIN` with `target_component` for improved query clarity in migrations and tests.
Bump version to 0.12.3 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Fix table alias in `dbo.GetVersionedTagComments` migration for `tag_comment` table.
Add clustered indexes to various migration tables and update primary key definitions where applicable
Add database-specific table creation logic and index updates for `tag_member` and `data_type_member` tables.
Bump version to 0.12.4 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add database-specific logic for `rung` table creation and indexing in migration
Bump version to 0.12.5 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Add fake tag and program generation logic to `TestSource.Fake` for improved test data creation
Update migrations to add unique indexes for `target_component` and `target_version_map` tables and enhance `TestSource` with public fake data generators and tests.
Mark `ExecuteQuery_AfterLargeNumberOfFakeImports_ShouldBePerformant` test as explicit for ongoing work on high-load query stress testing.
Bump version to 0.12.6 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Update `M20260206Tests` to assert `component_id` column type as `tinyint`
Update `.idea` workspace configuration to reflect changes in migrations, performance tests, and schema mappings.
Add SQLite and SQL Server-specific table creation and indexing logic for `rung`, `tag_member`, and `data_type_member` tables in migrations.
Rnemaed all the version helper functions to different name that aligns more with the database table names for easy discovery.
Bump version to 0.12.7 in project files for service and CLI applications.
Rename versioned helper functions for rung hierarchy to a unified `logic_for` function, simplify test assertions, and update workspace configuration to reflect changes.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: Rename versioned helper functions for rung hierarchy to a unified `logic_for` function, simplify test assertions, and update workspace configuration to reflect changes.
